name: Allstrokes Golf Club
address: 3210 E Chinden Blvd Suite 118, Eagle, ID 83616
about: AllStrokes Golf Club is a premier, state-of-the-art indoor golf facility in Boise, Idaho, offering a private, members-only experience. The club is equipped with top-of-the-line Trackman golf simulators that accurately replicate over 200+ golf courses worldwide. It provides a supportive environment for golfers of all skill levels to practice, compete in leagues, and improve their game through lessons and training programs. Flexible membership options are available, including monthly, 6-month, and annual plans, with 24/7 access to the facilities for members.
why_golfers_like_it: Access to 200+ golf courses worldwide through state-of-the-art Trackman simulators
24/7 availability for members, allowing practice anytime regardless of weather
Supportive community environment with leagues and opportunities for skill improvement

food_and_drink.notes: No mention of food service; BYOB policy for events
No mention of alcohol service; BYOB policy for events

simulator_hardware.notes: Top-of-the-line radar-based launch monitors with accurate ball tracking

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: Yes, members should bring their own clubs as the facility does not provide club rentals.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: Yes, members can bring their own food and drinks, with a BYOB policy for events.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: The time for 18 holes depends on the course and simulator settings; members can book specific time slots via the app.

faq.question: Is the facility kid-friendly?
faq.answer: The facility hosts family-friendly events, but it is primarily geared towards adult golfers and corporate groups.
